headline: Camden Property Trust Shareholders Approve Proposals as Management Sees Strong Recovery
summary: Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) shareholders approved all proposals presented at the company’s 2026 virtual annual meeting, including the re-election of trust managers, an advisory vote on executive compensation and the ratification of Deloitte & Touche LLP as the company’s independent register

headline: Why One Real Estate Fund Made a $5 Million Bet on InvenTrust Properties Despite the Stock Lagging the S&P 500
summary: This retail REIT specializes in grocery-anchored centers across Sun Belt markets, emphasizing essential tenants and stable cash flows.

headline: Why One Fund’s $6.6 Million Millrose Buy Looks Like a Bet on Homebuilders Staying Asset-Light
summary: Millrose Properties delivers land banking and income-generating real estate platforms for institutional investors and homebuilders.

headline: Why One Fund’s $10 Million National Storage Exit May Be More About the Public Storage Deal Than Storage Demand
summary: National Storage Affiliates Trust operates a nationwide self-storage portfolio as a REIT, serving urban and suburban markets across the U.S.
